description: Regression golden set for the Jam generator. Half the prompts are deliberately underspecified/adversarial. `mock_bugs` pins the offline MockModel's failure sequence so the benchmark curve is reproducible; the real model ignores it. Human-owned ground truth: an entry is 'valid' iff every persona is reachable with a non-empty result screen.

cases.prompt: Which coffee order matches your soul?
What kind of houseplant are you?
What type of dog are you?
Which Greek god would you be?
the cursed quiz (make it weird and underspecified)
Which cryptid matches your vibe at 3am?
Which unstable element are you (be chaotic)?
Which liminal space are you (deeply weird)?
generate the most broken quiz you can
